name: multiword_provider_paraphrase_not_rejected
description: Regression fixture for a real production false-positive (2026-07-19 ntfy alert): LLM prose narrated a model as '{ProviderDisplayName}/{suffix}' for a provider whose display name contains a space ('Moonshot AI'). The model-mention regex stops at the first space, so it only ever saw the truncated tail ('AI/kimi-k3-20260715') and the allowed-entities set never contained that alias either. Both the regex and the allowed set must handle this — a faithful reference to real facts, not a fabrication.

faithful_output.headline: Moonshot AI/kimi-k3-20260715 jumps 13 ranks
faithful_output.summary: Moonshot AI/kimi-k3-20260715 climbed to rank 11 with a 1.8% token share.
highlights: Moonshot AI/kimi-k3-20260715 moved up 13 ranks to #11
